name: claudetalk
description: Inter-Claude messaging over MCP. One-plugin marketplace: `claude plugin marketplace add g-cqd/claudetalk` then `claude plugin install claudetalk@claudetalk`.

plugins.name: claudetalk
plugins.description: Inter-Claude messaging over MCP. Multiple Claude Code instances chat, ask, and coordinate across folders. Bun + bun:sqlite + Server-Sent Events dashboard. Also advertises the claude/channel capability for real-time push when loaded as a channel plugin.
